description: Perform a residual normality check for an ANOVA analysis using the dataset '~/Documents/Jamovi/ToothGrowth.csv'. Model 'len' as the dependent variable and 'dose' as the fixed factor. Calculate the residuals for this model and conduct a Shapiro-Wilk normality test on the residuals. Save the completed analysis as '~/Documents/Jamovi/ToothGrowth_Residuals.omv'.
